info.title: Territorial Epidemiological Intelligence API
info.description: REST API for territorial epidemiological indicators, risk, anomalies, and insights.

schema.title: Response List Health Indicators Api V1 Health Indicators Get
Response Search Municipalities Api V1 Municipalities Get
Response Get Territorial Boundaries Api V1 Territorial Boundaries Get
Response List Territorial Risk Map Api V1 Territorial Risk Map Get
Response List Outbreak Map Api V1 Outbreak Map Get
Response List Insights Api V1 Insights Get

analysis_note.title: Analysis Note
analysis_note.default: Comparación descriptiva por departamento; no implica causalidad ni control por confusores socio-demográficos.

coverage_note.title: Coverage Note
coverage_note.default: Coverage depends on published open data; gaps must be interpreted cautiously.

id.title: Id
id.description: Stable identifier for the territorial observation.

system_context.title: System Context
system_context.description: Explains data window, models and limits of the narrative.

persisted.title: Persisted
persisted.description: Whether the score is stored for audit and map views.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: Informe exploratorio basado en datos abiertos; no sustituye validación epidemiológica ni decisiones institucionales.
